title: Naukri.com Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Naukri.com Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Naukri.com Capital India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
